Okay, so Turbo the snail is trying to get from the first row to the last row on a board that has 2024 rows and 2023 columns. There are monsters hidden in 2022 cells. The rules are that each row except the first and last has exactly one monster, and each column has at most one monster. Turbo doesn't know where the monsters are initially, but he remembers if he's stepped on one. The question is asking for the minimum number of attempts n needed so that Turbo can guarantee reaching the last row by the nth attempt, no matter where the monsters are placed.
